tasks.subject: Phase 1 — Agent schema parser
tasks.description:
Implement Phase 1 of plan.md exactly as specified. See plan.md "Phase 1 — Schema parser" section for the full deliverables, tasks, and verify script. Summary:

1. Create `extensions/_agent-schema/` with seven files: types.ts, parse-frontmatter.ts, parse-json.ts, permission.ts, prompt-resolver.ts, tools-spec.ts, defaults.ts. Plus load-settings-agents.ts helper.
2. Confirm pi auto-loader skips leading-underscore dirs by reading docs at `$PI_CODING_AGENT_DIR` extensions docs. If it does NOT skip, relocate to `lib/agent-schema/` and update all imports.
3. Implement the opencode-parity schema per PRD "Agent Definition Schema" (mode default = "all", description required for subagents, permission map validation with shorthand + per-pattern object, tools accepts both opencode object shape and PI comma-string, prompt {file:...} resolver, alias collapse maxSteps→steps and enabled:false→disable:true, retain all PI-specific fields).
4. Refactor `extensions/modes.ts` to delegate to parseAgentFrontmatter; install transitional primary-cycling gate (exclude in-repo agents lacking explicit mode: AND lacking prompt_mode/display_name).
5. Refactor `extensions/orchestration/custom-agents.ts` and `extensions/orchestration/agent-types.ts` to delegate to parseAgentFrontmatter.
6. Wire loadSettingsAgents at both call sites (modes.ts + orchestration/custom-agents.ts), JSON wins over markdown by name.
7. Create `scripts/phase1-verify.sh` exactly as specified — must check seven files exist, ≥2 hits for parseAgentFrontmatter in old extensions, ≥1 hit for parseAgentJson, run an embedded `npx tsx` harness covering all 11 listed parser behaviors, and run check-build.sh.
8. Both `bash scripts/check-build.sh` and `bash scripts/check-invariants.sh` and `bash scripts/phase1-verify.sh` must exit 0.
9. After all checks green, update plan.md: change every `- [ ]` to `- [x]` only within the "## Phase 1" section's task lists.
10. Commit with message: `phase 1: agent schema parser (opencode parity)`.

Do NOT proceed to Phase 2. Read prd.md and plan.md first for full context. Keep every file ≤250 lines. Strict validation errors must not abort the extension load — they must surface via the existing agent-load error path and other agents continue loading.

Report back: list of files created, verify script output summary, commit SHA.
